items.title: What to know about Holi, the Hindu festival of colors
items.description: Holi is the Hindu festival of colors, which celebrates love, renewal and rejuvenation

items.title: Iran attacks threaten US economy with more uncertainty around inflation, growth
items.description: The U.S. and Israeli attacks on Iran add yet more question marks around a U.S. economy already buffeted by on-and-off tariffs, weak hiring, and linger...

items.title: Winning numbers drawn in Monday’s Powerball

items.title: Alabama man, on death row since 1990, to get new trial
items.description: One of Alabama’s longest-serving death row inmates could soon receive a new trial

items.title: United flight returns to LA airport for an evacuation after a reported fire
items.description: A United Airlines flight has returned to the Los Angeles airport for an emergency evacuation after a reported fire
